title: Massutashi's building pack
description: My personal building pack as seen on Planet Minecraft
body:
Overview

 

Find default building on creative to be a pain? Then look no further, this is my personal pack  I use for my builds as seen on Planet Minecraft. 

 

Megabuilds and custom terrain can be a pain, never mind detailing! So, I made this pack to streamline the process, you'll find new blocks, new building tools and distant horizons - a mod allowing you to view your world at incredible distances.

 

Core Mods -

 

More blocks -  from mods such as Blockus, Building but better etc to further enhance detail and customization in your builds.

 

Axiom - Extensive building tools allowing you to build bigger and faster. Tools such as copy and paste, clear all and rock tools enabling you to build some pretty cool terrain!

 

Distant horizons - For viewing custom terrain and your mega builds, this mod is a must for really sitting back and appreciating your world!

 

Performance enhancements - Sodium : boost your fps! and many other optimizations to ensure you can carry on building smoothly.

 

Continuity - Get those textures connected! Includes connected glass.



 

 

Texture Pack - Patrix 32x - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/patrix-32x

 

Shaders - BSL Shaders - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/shaders/bsl-shaders

 

Images - Take a look at some of my screenshots in the images tab!

 

FInal notes - If you have any changes or improvements you'd like to add please feel free to comment and I'll see what I can do. Also, please feel free to use whatever shaders and texture packs you want just make sure they are for 1.20.1 and that your PC can actually run them!

 

Happy Building!
